name: Cuba Libre

spec.method_detail: Build in ice-filled highball. Add rum and lime. Top with cola. Stir gently.

history: 'Free Cuba!' — the battle cry of Cuban independence fighters. The drink emerged around the time of the Spanish-American War (1898) when American soldiers drank rum mixed with the newly popular Coca-Cola in Havana. 'Cuba Libre' as a toast merged with the drink itself. It's more than a rum and Coke: the lime is essential, and fresh lime changes the drink entirely.
